description: /contact/page.tsx does not read the ref or listing_id query params from the URL. The pilot card 'Report a listing issue' link sends users to /contact?ref=pilot-listing&listing_id=… but the page ignores those params. Reports filed today via this path lose their listing context and would be received as generic contact messages.
recommended_fix: Contact-page sprint must (a) read searchParams.ref and searchParams.listing_id; (b) prefill subject + a hidden listing_id field; (c) submit to a real intake endpoint.
notes: Out of scope for this sprint — UI/route change. Documented for the future contact-page sprint.

description: The Send Message button is type=button with no onClick or onSubmit handler. The contact form is decorative today — clicking Send does nothing.
recommended_fix: Contact-page sprint must wire the form to either a Next.js server action or a /api/contact route handler with rate limiting + the future intake schema.
notes: Out of scope for this sprint.

description: Even if the form submitted today the form fields are firstName/lastName/email/subject/message — listing_id and ref are not added to the payload sent.
recommended_fix: Add hidden inputs for ref and listing_id when those query params are present; include them in the future intake schema's required_fields list (already done in this sprint's schema).

description: No /api/contact or equivalent server action exists to receive corrections. Reports must currently be filed via support@uscehub.com email manually.
recommended_fix: Future correction-intake-backsite-spec sprint should design + implement a minimal Next.js server action that accepts the v1 schema and writes to a file-based correction queue OR to support@uscehub.com.
notes: Out of scope for this sprint.

description: The active 5 cards' screenshot/Wayback paths live on the T7 lane curator queue. Mac-local does not have the active 5 evidence files. This is a pre-existing condition documented in earlier sprints; not a regression.
recommended_fix: Future ops-cleanup sprint may transplant the T7-lane evidence files to Mac-local OR keep T7 as canonical for the active 5.
